archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with Tech Museum Variant

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside floating panels.

panels.style: Holographic Glassmorphism: bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-2xl p-6.
panels.left_panel: Description & Specs. Positioned absolutely on the left of the screen (e.g. left-8 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-80).
panels.top_panel: History. Positioned top/center (e.g. top-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-96).
panels.right_panel: Popular Implementations. Positioned right of the screen (e.g. right-8 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-80).
panels.animation: Framer Motion. Fade in and slight Y-axis translation on mount.

hotspots.marker_style: Pulsing cyan ring/dot using @react-three/drei Html component. Use a tiny div with animate-ping.
hotspots.modal_style: Tiny glassmorphism tooltip attached to the hotspot: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-cyan-500/30 p-4 rounded-xl text-sm w-48.
hotspots.interaction: On pointer over: trigger 3D component material emissive color to cyan. On click: expand the HTML detail modal.

raspberry_pi_3d.structure: Procedurally generated using Three.js primitives (Box, Cylinder).
raspberry_pi_3d.components: Silver/Grey metallic materials for CPU, USB, HDMI, Ethernet ports. Black headers for GPIO.

animations.floor: Pulsing/moving texture effect on the circuit floor grid.

images.description: Subtle glowing neon cyan circuit board floor texture
Dark futuristic tech background for overall app fallback background

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the hero scene inside a full-screen <Canvas> container.

Procedurally generate the Raspberry Pi 3 Model B using basic R3F primitives (<Box>, <Cylinder>). Create a main board (PCB) and place components (GPIO, CPU, USB, HDMI, Ethernet, microSD, WiFi, Power) on top at accurate relative positions.
Add 'Html' components from '@react-three/drei' attached to specific 3D coordinates on the board to act as clickable hotspots.
When a hotspot is hovered, update the material of that specific 3D primitive to glow (emissive cyan).
When a hotspot is clicked, display a detail modal (either inside the Html component or via a React state driving a 2D overlay).
Implement the floor grid using a <Plane> with the provided '3d_environment_floor_texture' as a map or emissiveMap.
Set up cinematic three-point lighting (ambient light, directional light, and a cyan point light). You can also use <Environment preset='city'>.
Position the 3 holographic UI panels (Specs, History, Implementations) as absolute DOM overlays sitting on top of the Canvas, styled with the Glassmorphism properties provided.
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hotspot-cpu', data-testid='panel-history').
